---
title: "Post With HTML"
date: 2026-01-20
---

A normal markdown paragraph.

<ul>
<li>Item one</li>
<li>Item two</li>
<li>Item three</li>
</ul>

<p>A paragraph in HTML with <strong>bold</strong> and <a href="/link">a link</a>.</p>

<table>
<tr><th>Name</th><th>Value</th></tr>
<tr><td>Foo</td><td>123</td></tr>
<tr><td>Bar</td><td>456</td></tr>
</table>

Back to normal markdown with **bold**.
